meta.title: ilo lipu pi toki pona (mani ala)
meta.description: lipu pi mani ala tawa kama sona toki pona: Reader's Kit, Chinese Wisdom, en Heart Sutra lon toki pona.

hero.title: ilo lipu pi toki pona + ante toki pi mani ala
hero.subtitle: lipu ni li pali tawa ijo pi mani ala lon toki pona. o open kepeken Reader's Kit, o tawa Chinese Wisdom, o lukin e Heart Sutra lon toki pona.

why.title: tan seme la kulupu ni li pona?

clarity.title: toki lili, sona pona
clarity.text: toki pona li weka e nasa. lipu ni li pona tawa lukin lili lon tenpo lili.

free.title: ijo open pi mani ala
free.text: ijo suli ale lon lipu ni li mani ala: lipu kama jo anu lipu ante toki.

practice.title: lipu tawa pali
practice.text: o kepeken ni sama nasin: o open, o lukin, o lukin sin, o kama sona mute lon tenpo.

collection.title: lipu en ilo pi mani ala

readers-kit.title: Reader's Kit pi toki pona (mani ala)
readers-kit.author: jan ABVX
readers-kit.shortDesc: ilo open ni li pona tawa kama sona pi toki pona.
readers-kit.longDesc: ona li jo e nasin open tawa lukin lipu, e kulupu nimi lili, e linja tawa ilo kama sona pi mani ala.

chinese-wisdom-kit.title: sona Sina lon toki pona (ilo pi mani ala)
chinese-wisdom-kit.author: jan ABVX
chinese-wisdom-kit.shortDesc: ilo ni li pana e lipu open pi sona Sina lon nasin kama sona toki pona.
chinese-wisdom-kit.longDesc: ona li pona tawa lukin lili lon tenpo lili: lipu PDF li lon, en nasin open tawa jan kama sona pi lukin toki tu.

heart-sutra.title: Heart Sutra lon toki pona (ante toki pi mani ala)
heart-sutra.author: jan ABVX
heart-sutra.shortDesc: lipu ni li ante toki pi mani ala tawa lukin Heart Sutra lon toki pona.
heart-sutra.longDesc: lipu ni li jo e nena tawa kama jo e lipu en lukin lipu lon linja. linja li TODO tawa tenpo kama.

faq.title: toki wile (FAQ)
faq.subtitle: toki lili pi nasin kepeken lipu ni.

items.a: ni li kulupu ijo pi mani ala tawa kama sona toki pona en ante toki.

items.q: ijo seme li lon tenpo ni?
items.a: ijo suli tu wan: Reader's Kit, Chinese Wisdom lon toki pona, en Heart Sutra lon toki pona.

items.q: ijo ni ale li mani ala anu seme?
items.a: lon. lipu ni li lon tawa ilo kama sona en ante toki pi mani ala taso.

items.q: mi wile sona toki pona tan open anu seme?
items.a: ala. o open kepeken Reader's Kit.

items.q: mi ken kama sona taso kepeken ni anu seme?
items.a: lon. nasin li pona tawa lukin lili lon tenpo ale.

items.q: tan seme la linja ali li toki TODO?
items.a: linja final li kama ala lon tenpo ni. ijo lukin li pona, sina ken ante e linja lon tenpo kama.

items.q: EN en TP li lon anu seme?
items.a: lon. lipu ni li jo e /en en /tp.

items.q: mi ken toki ike tawa seme?
items.a: o tawa linja GitHub lon noka lipu.

legal.title: lipu lawa
legal.ipValue: lipu en sitelen ale li tan jan lawa anu li jo e wile.
legal.liabilityValue: sona ni li kama sama ni taso.
legal.externalLinksValue: linja tawa tomo jan ante li lon.

privacy.title: nasin len
privacy.dataValue: tomo lipu ni li alasa ala e sona jan lon nasin open.
privacy.cookiesValue: kuki sona lukin li lon ala lon nasin open. ilo pi jan ante li ken pana e kuki.
privacy.thirdPartyValue: linja jan ante li jo e nasin ona.
privacy.rightsValue: sina wile sona la, o toki tawa mi.
